title: rubus orthacanthus subsp. oreochares
intro: Rubus orthacanthus subsp. oreochares, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus orthacanthus subsp. oreochares include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
